backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining content types (events, scare zones, shows, attractions, haunted houses) with type-specific fields, audition form types (scare actor, dance, costume character), and authorization mixins using Map/List data structures.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting six implemented features for upcoming attractions timeline (2027-2029) including Starr Eyes restaurant, Lone Starr stunt show, Chaos Breaths land, Fire over Water show, and Dragon Lair show with high confidence test mappings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of frontend components including App.tsx routing, layout components (header/footer/section), theme components (horror background), content sections (hero, auditions, haunted houses, food booths, merch, scare zones, info), and static data modules for food booths and haunted houses.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme color schemes using oklch color space, defining design tokens for background, foreground, card, popover, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, input, ring, chart, and sidebar colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with UTF-8 charset, viewport meta tag, "TCEA Scream Park" title, root div mount point, and module script loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component with QueryClientProvider, hash-based routing for 40+ pages/sections, home page layout orchestrating hero, auditions, haunted houses, food booths, merch, scare zones, shows, upcoming attractions, info sections, plus background audio manager and toaster notifications.
frontend/src/components/audio/Background: Audio manager component handling looping chainsaw and clown laugh ambient sounds with autoplay detection, fallback logic, volume control from preferences, play/pause state management, and callback exposure for manual playback triggering.
frontend/src/components/audio/SoundContr: Provides UI controls for toggling sound on/off and adjusting volume using a slider, with special handling for autoplay-blocked scenarios requiring user gesture to enable audio.
frontend/src/components/auth/AccessDenie: Displays a full-page access denied message with a shield icon and alert, informing non-admin users they cannot access the content management system.
frontend/src/components/auth/EmployeeGua: Route guard component that checks if user is authenticated and has employee permissions, showing appropriate login prompts or access denied messages before rendering protected employee content.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Renders a login/logout button that toggles Internet Identity authentication, handles loading states, and clears query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog that prompts authenticated users without a profile to enter their name, saving it to the backend and preventing dismissal until completed.
frontend/src/components/layout/EmployeeL: Layout wrapper for employee portal pages with custom styling, breadcrumb navigation, header with back-to-guest-site link, and confidential footer.
frontend/src/components/layout/Section.t: Reusable section component with centered title, optional subtitle and icon, separator line, and scroll margin for anchor navigation.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteFoote: Site footer displaying an extreme haunt warning alert with liability disclaimer and attribution with link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteHeade: Main site header with navigation menu (desktop and mobile), login button, sound controls, employee portal link for authorized users, and scroll-based styling changes with blood overlay image.
frontend/src/components/media/Fullscreen: Fullscreen video player overlay with play/pause and mute controls, autoplay support, escape key to close, and optional title display.
frontend/src/components/sections/AboutAt: Displays the 'About the Attraction' section with a hero image, building description, and dark backstory of TCEA Scream Park's 2022 closure and 2026 reopening due to paranormal activity.
frontend/src/components/sections/auditio: Shows three audition perks (food, training, scary vibes) in a card grid layout with icons and descriptions.
Provides two call-to-action cards for scare actor and dancer auditions with click handlers passed as props.
Dialog form for costume character auditions with extensive fields (name, experience, vocal skills, etc.) that submits via Internet Identity authentication and a custom hook.
Dialog form for dancer auditions requiring Internet Identity login, collecting name, age, experience, preferences, and submitting via useSubmitDancerAudition hook.
Dialog form for scare actor auditions requiring Internet Identity login, collecting name, age, experience, preferences, and submitting via useSubmitScareActorAudition hook.
frontend/src/components/sections/Auditio: Renders audition cards for Costume Character, Scream Team, and Dancer roles with requirements, badges, and signup dialogs; includes navigation to auditions section and displays perks block.
frontend/src/components/sections/ClownTo: Shows an interior elevation image and description of the Clown Town haunted attraction featuring twisted circus theming, funhouse mirrors, and carnival horror elements.
frontend/src/components/sections/Costume: Announces the 2030 investment in new costume characters including Lola & Asher the Rabbits and Max, with cards displaying character images, descriptions, and audition navigation.
frontend/src/components/sections/Employe: Conditionally renders an employee-only portal link card with navigation to secret tunnels when user is authenticated and authorized as an employee.
frontend/src/components/sections/FoodBoo: Displays a grid of food booth cards with images, descriptions, menu highlights, and navigation to detail pages for specific booths; includes fallback image logic.
frontend/src/components/sections/Haunted: Renders haunted house attraction cards with hover effects, images, descriptions, wait times, and buttons for viewing guest rules and detail pages for specific houses.
frontend/src/components/sections/HomeHer: Hero section component with video background, logo, title, and three CTA buttons that scroll to auditions or navigate to specific audition pages for scare actors and dancers.
frontend/src/components/sections/HomeInt: Video player section with play/pause, mute, and fullscreen controls, featuring an intro video with poster image, error handling, and audio playback on video end.
frontend/src/components/sections/HomePro: Section showcasing the Main Street Plaza Procession event at 6pm, featuring an image card with description of sliders, stilt walkers, zombies, and other creatures.
frontend/src/components/sections/InfoLoc: Information section displaying operating hours (Fri-Sun, 5pm+), ticket pricing ($30), pass options via PassSelector component, and rules/warnings including an 11pm nightly release warning.
frontend/src/components/sections/MerchSh: Merchandise storefront section featuring Felix's Merch Booth with category filtering and a grid of product cards displaying character gear and collectibles.
frontend/src/components/sections/passes/: Defines PassOption interface and exports an array of 9 pass types (Bloody, U Think U Brave, Regular, Horn, Content Creator, Touch, Skip the Line, Blackout, Kid) with pricing and descriptions for a haunted attraction.
Radio-button pass selector component that displays pass options in cards and shows a confirmation alert when a pass is secured.
frontend/src/components/sections/ScareZo: Grid display of scare zones with image cards, descriptions, and buttons to view guest rules or detailed pages for specific zones like Santa's Hell and Chainsaw Cold.
frontend/src/components/sections/Schoolh: Displays a grid of sneak peek cards for four haunted houses (Schoolhouse, Clown Town, Hell Hole, Toys Come to Play) with images, descriptions, and navigation buttons. Each card links to a detailed sneak peek view via hash routing.
frontend/src/components/sections/ShowsSe: Renders a grid of live show cards with images, descriptions, and badges indicating haunt season exclusivity or coming year. Includes error handling for failed image loads.
frontend/src/components/sections/Sliders: Implements a carousel/slider for the 'Sliders of Decade' show featuring images and videos with navigation controls, thumbnail selection, autoplay functionality, and fullscreen support. Includes fallback overlay for devices without native fullscreen.
frontend/src/components/sections/Teaser2: Teases two new haunted houses coming in 2027 ('Hogs Pen' and 'Shattered Minds') with dramatic descriptions and taglines in styled cards. Features a prominent announcement banner with skull icon.
frontend/src/components/sections/TeaserS: Simple teaser card with sparkles icon announcing 'Many Things to Come' for future park announcements.
frontend/src/components/sections/Upcomin: Displays upcoming attractions (2027-2029) organized by year, including restaurants, shows, and themed lands with sub-attractions. Features image galleries with error handling and year-based grouping.

Shows upcoming special events in a card grid with image galleries, date labels, and descriptions. Includes special navigation for 'Frosted Haunt' event and multi-image carousel support with error handling.
Displays a grid of planned themed lands with details like opening year, size, and featured shows, filtered from themedLands content.
frontend/src/components/theme/HorrorBack: React component rendering a layered horror-themed background with chainsaw image, animated fire/smoke/blood/chainsaw overlays, orange/green gradients, noise texture, and scanline effects.
frontend/src/content/foodBooths.ts: Exports horror-themed food booth data including Clown Town Chicken, Hell Hole BBQ, Schoolhouse Fish, Asylum Seekers pizza, Felix's Yum eggs, and others with descriptions and menu items.
frontend/src/content/generatedImages.ts: Maps image paths for haunted houses, scare zones, food booths, merch shops, auditions, shows, and upcoming events to their respective asset files with dimensions.
frontend/src/content/guestRules.ts: Defines safety, behavior, and health warning rules for specific haunted house attractions (Open Ice Tomb, Wax Works, Terror Hell Hole) with structured sections.
frontend/src/content/hauntedHouses.ts: Exports array of 11 haunted house attractions with names, taglines, and descriptions including Clown Town, Asylum Hell, Schoolhouse Break, Terror Hell Hole, and others.
frontend/src/content/merchShops.ts: Exports merchandise shop data with three shops (Dungeon Master, Painted Smiles, Dead Eyes) listing items and price ranges for horror-themed merchandise.
frontend/src/content/merchStorefront.ts: Defines the merch product catalog with categories (hoodies, hats, shirts, posters, plushies) and products featuring characters Riley, Ace, Kevin, and Rocky. Exports TypeScript interfaces and arrays for browsing merchandise without checkout functionality.
frontend/src/content/scareZones.ts: Exports an array of scare zone descriptions including Carnival Bros Circus, Zombie Hell, Screamtown Chaos, Grave Danger Dance, and Steampunk Hell (coming 2028). Each zone includes name, tagline, detailed description, and location.
frontend/src/content/schoolhouseSneakPee: Exports a single object describing the Schoolhouse Haunted House with title, subtitle, detailed horror-themed description, and an image path for a sneak peek elevation view.
frontend/src/content/shows.ts: Exports an array of show descriptions including Circus Town, Dead Man's Revenge, Lost Spirits, Fire Remix, Camp Riley, and Color Paint. Each show includes name, description, haunt-season flag, and optional year.
frontend/src/content/showsEntrance.ts: Defines TypeScript interface and content for the Shows & Processions Secret Entrance, including unlock year (2040), locked/unlocked descriptions, location details, and performer access instructions.
frontend/src/content/slidersOfDecade.ts: Exports an array of slider items (images and videos) for the 'Sliders of Decade' haunt season show, including media sources, titles, descriptions, and optional video posters.
frontend/src/content/tceaTunnels.ts: Defines TypeScript interface and content for TCEA Tunnels facilities including secret entrance details, employee dormitories, cafeteria, TV/recreation lounge, and staff break areas with access and security information.
frontend/src/content/themedLands.ts: Defines TypeScript interface and exports an array of themed lands, currently containing Kid Grove (500,000 sq ft, opening 2050) with description, status, and future shows like Color Paint.
frontend/src/content/upcomingEvents.ts: Exports an array of upcoming events including Chaos Purge, Death Eaters, Frosted Haunt, Viva Nova, DMV Harbor Nights, and TCEA Horror Nights with names, descriptions, dates, and year/month/day fields.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Manages the backend actor instance with authentication, creating anonymous or authenticated actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuditionLinks.ts: Provides a React Query hook to fetch audition links from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuditionSubmission: Exports mutation hooks for submitting three types of audition forms (scare actor, dancer, costume character) to the backend, with query invalidation on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuthz.ts: Provides authorization hooks to check caller's user role, admin status, employee status, and user profile from the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useAutoplayVideo.ts: Manages video autoplay state and handles browser autoplay blocking with play/pause controls.
frontend/src/hooks/useContentItems.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on content items (events, scare zones, shows, attractions) and seeding initial content.
frontend/src/hooks/useEmployeeEvents.ts: Fetches upcoming events for authenticated employees based on the current date.
Queries the backend for the event unlock status for authenticated users.
frontend/src/hooks/useFullscreen.ts: Manages fullscreen state and provides cross-browser compatible enter/exit/toggle fullscreen functions for a given element.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality, identity management, and status tracking using AuthClient.
Provides hooks to fetch and update the main haunt schedule (event date ranges) with query invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useSoundPreferences.t: React hook that manages sound preferences (enabled/volume) with localStorage persistence, providing getters and setters for audio settings.
frontend/src/hooks/useTunnelData.ts: React Query hooks for fetching tunnel-related data (maps, room assignments, schedules) from the backend actor, with automatic refetching and caching.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind imports, OKLCH color theme variables for horror/employee portal themes, custom utility classes for glows and effects, and forced white text styling.
frontend/src/lib/contentFormatting.ts: Utility functions for formatting backend content types (dates, event types, scare levels, locations, age restrictions) into human-readable strings.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/ActorsPage.tsx: Protected page displaying actor staffing information, requiring Internet Identity authentication and fetching staffing counts from the backend.
frontend/src/pages/AuditionsPage.tsx: Public page displaying audition links with hiring banner, loading/error states, and filtering of placeholder URLs.
frontend/src/pages/CalendarPage.tsx: Calendar view page that displays content items grouped by date with filtering by type, expandable date ranges, and URL hash-based date navigation.
Detail page for the 'Candy Cane Carnage' food booth, displaying booth image, description, tagline, and menu items with a back navigation button.
frontend/src/pages/ChainsawColdPage.tsx: Detail page for the 'Chainsaw Cold' scare zone with extreme horror warning alert, zone description, and buttons to navigate back or view guest rules.
frontend/src/pages/ClownTownSneakPeekPag: Sneak peek page for the 'Clown Town' haunted house, displaying a large hero image with house name, tagline, and description.
frontend/src/pages/CmsPage.tsx: Admin CMS page for managing content items and schedules with authentication guards, CRUD operations, tabs for filtering content types, and initial content seeding functionality.
frontend/src/pages/DancerAuditionPage.ts: Audition submission form for dancer roles requiring Internet Identity authentication, collecting personal info, experience, and role preferences with form validation.
frontend/src/pages/EggnogExorcismPage.ts: Detail page for the 'Eggnog Exorcism' food booth, displaying booth image, description, tagline, and menu items with a back navigation button.
frontend/src/pages/EmployeeUpcomingEvent: Employee-only page displaying upcoming events and features with locked/unlocked status badges, preview images, and navigation to detail pages for available content.
frontend/src/pages/FlynCharacterPage.tsx: Employee-only page displaying details about the Flyn character, including unlock status, biography, appearance schedule, and costume specifications. Uses EmployeeGuard and EmployeeLayout with conditional rendering based on event unlock status.
frontend/src/pages/FrostedHauntPage.tsx: Public-facing detail page for the Frosted Haunt seasonal event (Nov 29–Dec 26, 2026), showcasing event highlights, haunted houses, scare zones, and safety warnings. Includes navigation back to the upcoming events section.
frontend/src/pages/GingerdeadBakesPage.t: Detail page for the Gingerdead Bakes food booth, displaying booth information, tagline, description, and menu items. Includes navigation back to the food booths section.
frontend/src/pages/GuestRulesPage.tsx: Dynamic rules page that displays guest safety rules and regulations for specific haunted houses or scare zones based on URL hash routing. Includes mandatory rules alerts and navigation back to attraction listings.
frontend/src/pages/HappilyScaryAfterPage: Employee-only page for the Happily Scary After fireworks show, displaying unlock status, show description, schedule, and operational details. Uses EmployeeGuard with conditional content based on event unlock status.
Detail page for the 'Hellfire Hot Cocoa' food booth, displaying booth image, description, tagline, and menu items with a back navigation button.
frontend/src/pages/HellHoleSneakPeekPage: Detailed sneak peek page for the Terror Hell Hole haunted house, featuring the main attraction card and a dedicated section for Vicky's Saw scenic elevation with images and descriptions.
frontend/src/pages/LaserHellPage.tsx: Detail page for the 'Laser Hell' scare zone, showing zone image, location, tagline, and description with navigation back to scare zones list.
frontend/src/pages/ObsessionScreamPage.t: Detail page for 'Obsession Scream' haunted house featuring extreme horror warnings, character description of Leslie, and navigation to view rules.
frontend/src/pages/OpenIceTombPage.tsx: Detail page for 'Open Ice Tomb' haunted house with Christmas-horror theme, displaying extreme cold warnings, description, and button to view guest rules.
frontend/src/pages/OrnamentOssuaryPage.t: Detail page for 'Ornament Ossuary' food booth, showing booth image, description, tagline, and complete menu with back navigation.
frontend/src/pages/PaintDeathBoothPage.t: Detail page for 'Paint & Death' dual-themed food booth, displaying two separate menus (Paint Side and Death Side) in a split layout with descriptions.
frontend/src/pages/SantasHellPage.tsx: Displays detailed information about the "Santa's Hell" scare zone, including an image, description, extreme horror warning alert, and a button to view guest rules. Includes navigation back to the scare zones list.
frontend/src/pages/ScareActorAuditionPag: Provides a form for scare actor audition applications requiring Internet Identity authentication. Collects applicant details (name, age, height, weight, experience, role preference) and submits to backend via mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/SchoolhouseSneakPeekP: Displays a sneak peek card for the schoolhouse attraction with a large image, title, subtitle, and description. Includes navigation back to home.
frontend/src/pages/SecretTunnelsPage.tsx: Employee-only page displaying confidential backstage tunnel system information including maps, room assignments, and schedules. Features loading states, error handling, and restricted access warnings.
frontend/src/pages/SharksHellPage.tsx: Displays detailed information about the "Sharks Hell" food booth including an image, description, tagline, and full menu. Includes navigation back to the food booths section.
frontend/src/pages/ShowsEntrancePage.tsx: Employee-only page showing the secret entrance for shows and processions with unlock status, location details, and access instructions. Displays locked/unlocked state based on event unlock status from backend.
frontend/src/pages/SliderDoomPage.tsx: Displays detailed information about the "Slider Doom" food booth including an image, description, tagline, and full menu. Includes navigation back to the food booths section.
frontend/src/pages/TCEATunnelsPage.tsx: Employee-only page displaying information about TCEA Tunnels facilities including secret entrance details, dormitories, food areas, TV room, and lounge with images and security notes.
frontend/src/pages/ToysComeToPlayPage.ts: Public-facing detail page for the 'Toys Come to Play' haunted house attraction, featuring hero image, warnings, 22 scene descriptions, character details (Blippy and Jiffy), and navigation to rules.
frontend/src/pages/ToysComeToPlaySneakPe: Sneak peek preview page for 'Toys Come to Play' haunted house showing a large hero image with title, tagline, and description in a card layout.
frontend/src/pages/WaxWorksPage.tsx: Detail page for the 'Wax Works' haunted house with hero image, extreme horror warning alert, description, and button to view guest rules.
frontend/src/pages/WrathOfWrappingPage.t: Detail page for the 'Wrath of Wrapping' food booth displaying booth image, description, and full menu with item names and descriptions.
frontend/src/utils/dateRange.ts: Utility functions for handling event date ranges including date comparison, key generation, date iteration, and expanding date ranges into individual date keys.
frontend/src/utils/slug.ts: Simple utility function that converts text strings into URL-friendly slugs by lowercasing, removing special characters, and replacing spaces with hyphens.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: URL parameter utilities for extracting query parameters from both regular and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support and functions to clear parameters from URLs.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme extensions including employee-specific color variables, horror-themed animations (pulse-glow, strobe-flash, horror-drift), custom fonts (Inter, Creepster), and glow box shadows.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file documenting a theme park expansion app with timeline-based attractions (2027-2029), including features for restaurants, stunt shows, themed lands, and AI-generated image requirements in cartoon/horror/graffiti style.
